en: Challenge How many phrasal verbs with call do you know
ko: 도전! call이 들어간 구동사를 몇 개나 알아?

en: Let's test your knowledge Number 1 If you need to phone someone who you spoke to
ko: 지식을 테스트해보자. 1번. 전화로 얘기했던 사람에게 다시 전화해야 하면

en: on the phone earlier you call them back
Hi sorry can I call you back I'm just about to have my lunch
ko: 안녕, 미안한데 나중에 다시 전화해도 될까? 지금 점심 먹으려던 참이야.

en: Number 2 When we need to cancel an event or activity we call
it off I'm afraid we'll have to call off the team meeting Yeah I'm stuck in traffic
ko: call it off야. 팀 회의를 취소해야 할 것 같아. 교통 체증에 갇혀 있어.

en: Number 3 If someone criticises someone's behaviour publicly we can
say they call them out I don't think Andrew was stuck in traffic earlier I think he was
ko: call them out이야. Andrew가 아까 교통 체증에 갇혀 있었던 게 아닌 것 같아.

en: lying I'm going to call him out about it at the next meeting If you want to learn more useful
ko: 거짓말한 것 같아. 다음 회의에서 따져야겠어. 더 유용한 어휘를

en: follow us at BBC Learning English Number 4 When a person or a group of
ko: BBC Learning English를 팔로우해. 4번. 사람이나 단체가

en: people demand for something publicly they call for it I don't think you were
stuck in traffic earlier Okay I wasn't but I don't like coming into the office every day I call for
ko: 아까 교통 체증에 갇혀 있었던 게 아니었잖아. 맞아, 아니었어. 근데 매일 출근하는 게 싫어.

en: more relaxed working conditions Lastly number 5 If you visit someone
ko: 더 유연한 근무 조건을 요구해. 마지막으로 5번. 누군가를

en: you call in on them I hope Andrew's okay I should probably call in on him on my way home
ko: call in on이야. Andrew 괜찮은지 모르겠어. 퇴근길에 들러봐야겠다.

en: So did you know all of these phrasal verbs with call If you did well done If
ko: call이 들어간 구동사를 다 알았어? 맞혔으면 잘했어.

en: not don't worry Save this video and make it part of your English revision
ko: 아니어도 괜찮아. 이 영상을 저장해서 영어 복습에 활용해.
